channel.title: Travis-CI on Yu Cheng
channel.description: Recent content in Travis-CI on Yu Cheng

item.title: Renovate this place and new resolutions!
item.description: I’ve just spent the long weekend updating my nearly-abandoned website. This year, I have passed my qualifying exam (February), and the paper I’ve been working on for almost an year is now finally accepted. The website has been changed to a GitHub user-page, instead of a project-page. Also, now the website is automatically generated by Travis-CI, a very popular service recently, testing and deploying the codes to ensure portability. All the changes and new posts are made on my laptop.
